digest.component_or_area: identity authorship enforcement (write-gate, verify-authorship merge-gate, reducer, snapshot ledger)
propositions: Add opt-in config identity.require_authenticated (default off) and identity.signing_key for signing events at write time.
Optionally sign an event's canonical bytes (excluding author_sig) at the single append_event seam, writing unsigned best-effort on missing key/identity and never breaking a write.
Provide a UX-only fail-fast write-gate that blocks unsignable writes when require_authenticated is on, documented as not the security boundary.

Add verify-authorship merge-gate command that checks each mutating event for a valid author_id and author_sig, emitting verdicts verified/unsigned/unknown-author/bad-signature and exiting non-zero when enforcement is on and any event is not verified.
Ensure replay never rejects: bad-signature or unsigned events still fold into compiled state, with the reducer recording only per-ticket signed/unsigned presence counts.
Preserve folded events' author_id and author_sig in the snapshot's compiled_state authorship_ledger so post-compaction verify-authorship still verifies; surface counts in show and fsck.
